title: Olkaria VI Geothermal Expansion Approval
description: Approval of KES 28 billion capital expenditure for Olkaria VI geothermal power plant with 140 MW additional capacity

title: Lake Turkana Wind Power Offtake Agreement
description: Approval of 25-year power purchase agreement with Lake Turkana Wind Power for 310 MW wind energy

title: Fleet Renewal Programme — Boeing 787 Dreamliner
description: Approval of lease agreements for 4 additional Boeing 787-8 Dreamliner aircraft to expand long-haul capacity

title: Government Bailout Acceptance — KES 20 Billion
description: Acceptance of KES 20 billion government recapitalisation package subject to operational restructuring milestones

title: Last Mile Connectivity Phase III
description: Approval of KES 15 billion investment for connecting 500,000 additional households under the Last Mile Connectivity Project

title: Smart Meter Rollout Programme
description: Approval of KES 8 billion smart prepaid meter installation for 2 million customers to reduce non-technical losses

title: Mombasa Port Container Terminal Expansion
description: Approval of KES 45 billion expansion of Berths 21-26 to increase container handling capacity to 2 million TEUs annually

title: SGR Naivasha–Kisumu Extension Feasibility
description: Approval of KES 2.5 billion feasibility study for extending the Standard Gauge Railway from Naivasha to Kisumu

title: Mombasa–Nairobi Pipeline Capacity Upgrade
description: Approval of KES 12 billion upgrade of Line 1 pipeline to increase throughput capacity from 440,000 to 880,000 cubic metres per month

title: Digital Migration and OTT Platform Launch
description: Approval of KES 1.2 billion investment for digital broadcasting infrastructure upgrade and launch of KBC streaming platform
